message:
fix(supervision): conformance test correctness and clippy compliance

Address three issues in the supervisor conformance test suite:

- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to the monotone severity cross
  product test, which is necessarily large due to exhaustive strategy
  combination coverage
- Move init_test() call after the inner function definition in
  conformance_spawn_required_vs_optional_child_failure to satisfy
  Rust's item-before-use ordering requirement
- Narrow the catch-all match arm in required child failure assertion
  to explicitly match SupervisorSpawnError::RegionCreate, making the
  pattern exhaustive and preventing silent swallowing of unexpected
  error variants

Also syncs the beads issue tracker JSONL with current state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
